name: Cowra
title: Shutters, Blinds & Curtains in Cowra | Luxe Shutters
metaDescription: Shutters, blinds & curtains in Cowra NSW. Custom-made, professionally installed by Luxe Shutters. Free in-home consultation - call 1800-465-893.
heroTagline: Custom shutters and blinds delivered to Cowra
description: Luxe Shutters extends its premium service to Cowra and the Central West, offering custom shutters, blinds, curtains, and outdoor screens. From initial consultation to professional installation, we bring the same quality and attention to detail to every Cowra project.

faqs.q: How often do you visit Cowra?
faqs.a: We visit Cowra regularly for consultations and installations. Call 1800-465-893 to schedule — we'll coordinate with other Cowra appointments for efficiency.

faqs.q: Do you cover Grenfell and Canowindra too?
faqs.a: Yes, we service Cowra and all surrounding Central West towns including Grenfell, Canowindra, and Orange.

faqs.q: What's the turnaround time for Cowra orders?
faqs.a: From measurement to installation is typically 3-6 weeks depending on the product. We handle everything — you don't need to do anything except choose your style.
